Notice Of Motion In Support Of Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: DEFENDANT CLIF BAR & COMPANY's Motion In Support Of Motion To Stay. Judge Miller recuses herself. Per order of the Presiding Judge, to be heard in Department 220 before Judge McBride on the same date and time. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Defendant Clif Bar & Company'S Motion In Support Of Motion To Stay.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Denied
